title: Provider Endpoint Catalog
description: Canonical provider endpoint documentation catalog for Hermes repair engine. Stores configuration-relevant endpoint contract data: base URL, API style, auth style, region/scope notes, models-path behavior, and known caveats.

provider_aliases.description: Known stale or alternate aliases for this provider

endpoints.description: List of endpoint families for this provider

default_auth_type.description: Default authentication type for this provider

default_auth_key_env.description: Environment variable name that typically holds the API key, e.g. 'OPENAI_API_KEY'

region_codes.description: Region codes where this provider operates

family_name.description: Descriptive name for this endpoint family, e.g. 'OpenAI v1', 'Azure OpenAI'

base_url.description: Base URL for this endpoint family

auth_header_shape.description: Shape of the authentication header, e.g. 'Bearer <token>', 'Authorization: Bearer <token>', 'X-API-Key: <key>'

models_path.description: URL path for listing models, e.g. '/v1/models'

auth_type.description: Authentication type override for this endpoint family

region_scope.description: Region codes this specific endpoint family covers

compatibility_notes.description: Compatibility caveats for this endpoint family

is_default.description: True if this is the default endpoint family for the provider

is_stable.description: True if this endpoint family is considered stable/production-ready

last_verified.description: ISO-8601 date when this endpoint was last verified

doc_urls.description: Source documentation URLs for this endpoint family
